body:
This pull request sets the compat entry for the `YAML` package to `0.4`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
Note: Consider registering a new release of your package immediately after merging this PR, as downstream packages may depend on this for tests to pass.
title: CompatHelper: add new compat entry for YAML at version 0.4, (keep existing compat)

body:
This PR adds two jobs to the regular pipeline. These tests are part of the investigation in #1310 


## Content
- Adds MoistBaroclinic Wave IC specification that was missed in #1532 
- Added moist BW and moist HS jobs with 1st-order upwinding on tracers, energy and density to the regular CI pipeline. These have been tested and pass.
- Added relevant MSE tables
- Updated ref counter


Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: CI pipeline: Add 1st-order upwind tracer, energy, and density jobs

body:
## Purpose 
This PR adds jobs to our regular CI pipeline using 3rd-order upwinding alone on either only the tracer or tracers, energy, and density. 

This is part of the investigation for Issues #1513 and #1531 
 

## Content
- Added regular CI pipeline jobs for moist baroclinic wave and moist HS with 3rd-order upwinding on tracer alone, and tracer, density, and energy. These have been tested and pass.
- Updated MSE tables
- Updated ref counter


Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: CI pipeline: Add third-order upwinding MBW and MHS tests
